role: Infrastructure layer for LLM client abstraction, configuration, and resilient invocation within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides a comprehensive set of components for interacting with multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.), including interface definitions, a factory for client instantiation, global configuration file management, runtime resolution of settings from multiple sources, retry logic with exponential backoff for resilience, and concrete provider implementations. Collectively, these enable the system to generate semantic summaries and structured outputs from LLMs while handling configuration, credentials, error recovery, and provider abstraction.

children.role: TypeScript interface definitions module for LLM client abstractions, response structures, provider configuration, and semantic context tracking within the infrastructure layer.
Infrastructure layer facade factory for instantiating LLM provider clients based on configuration.
Infrastructure facade for global LLM configuration file I/O and credential store integration.
Provides concrete implementations and utilities for interfacing with various LLM providers (Gemini, OpenAI) and a mock provider for testing within the ArchSpine mirror system.
Infrastructure utility providing configurable retry logic with exponential backoff for resilient asynchronous operations.
Infrastructure module for LLM runtime configuration resolution and provider client factory, strictly limited to merging configuration sources and instantiating LLM clients.
